description: Customer product reviews and ratings. Table name is reviews, not product_reviews.

chunks.text:
TABLE: reviews

DESCRIPTION: Customer product reviews and ratings. Table name is reviews, not product_reviews.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: reviews, ratings, customer reviews, product ratings, feedback, star ratings, product feedback

PRIMARY_KEY: review_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: product_id → products.product_id, customer_id → customers.customer_id

COLUMNS: review_id, product_id, customer_id, rating, review_title, review_text, review_date, verified_purchase, helpful_votes

USE_CASES: Average rating, top rated products, customer feedback analysis
